name: Jellyboxd Sync
description: Two-way sync of watched, rating and favourite (movies & series) with Jellyboxd, plus a rating widget in the web client.
overview: Connect your Jellyfin server to your Jellyboxd account.

versions.changelog: Two-way sync via plugin pull (works for LAN-only servers). One-click pairing: the plugin links/creates your Jellyboxd account and gives you a login link — no second account. Per-user token + Jellyfin username config.
